    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Property street addresses such as 112 Queen St. East – specific addresses are not supported fields', 'Neighborhoods like Corktown or Entertainment District – not included in allowed location_neighborhood list', 'Requests to confirm if client is a first-time buyer – no field for buyer experience status', 'Detailed amortization periods (e.g., 25 years) – not represented as mortgage_term_years only covers term years', 'Inclusion of optional cleaning or appliance installation services – no field for these services', 'Land transfer tax breakdowns (provincial/municipal) – no field for taxes beyond property_taxes_annual']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "18, ['Property listings including type, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, and taxes', 'Property condition and amenities such as garden, balcony, smart_home, energy_efficient', 'Viewing arrangement requests and scheduling with specific dates and times', 'Viewing confirmation and duration (one hour, in-person)', 'Preparation of property information packets', 'Financing options with purchase_method, down_payment_required, interest_rate, mortgage_term_years', 'Cash purchase method', 'Legal services packages with cost, service_level (basic, premium), and service_type legal', 'Title insurance and legal fees as part of financing_options', 'Moving services with cost and service_level (standard, premium)', 'Utility setup packages with cost, services_included, and package_type (basic, premium)', 'Service coordination and combined cost summaries', 'Status updates indicating viewing confirmed and documentation received', 'Total package cost summaries mapping to total_package_summary fields', 'Availability status for properties (available)', 'Request to confirm viewing preference dates', 'Request to proceed with legal package selection', 'Request to include moving/setup package in final cost summary']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Property street addresses such as 112 Queen St. East – specific addresses are not supported fields', 'Neighborhoods like Corktown or Entertainment District – not included in allowed location_neighborhood list', 'Requests to confirm if client is a first-time buyer – no field for buyer experience status', 'Detailed amortization periods (e.g., 25 years) – not represented as mortgage_term_years only covers term years', 'Inclusion of optional cleaning or appliance installation services – no field for these services', 'Land transfer tax breakdowns (provincial/municipal) – no field for taxes beyond property_taxes_annual']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
